title: Ignored/discarded MCP tool arguments (layer_filter & target_paths)
description: The MCP tool definitions for fab_plan_context and fab_recall declare layer_filter (and target_paths for plan_context), but the registration callbacks in plan-context.ts and recall.ts omit these fields from destructuring and never pass them to the underlying services. Any client/LLM-supplied values are silently discarded.
fix_direction: Destructure layer_filter and target_paths in registerPlanContext and layer_filter in registerRecall, pass them to the services, and extend PlanContextInput to declare layer_filter.

title: YAML frontmatter injection via unescaped array joining (review merge/patch)
description: In rewriteFrontmatterMerge and appendPatchLines, array fields (tags, relevance_paths) are serialized into YAML frontmatter by joining elements with ', ' with no quoting/escaping. An element containing commas, brackets, newlines, or quotes corrupts the YAML flow-array syntax or allows arbitrary frontmatter injection.
fix_direction: Map each array item through an escaping/quoting helper (quoteIfNeeded / quoteRelevancePath) to escape backslashes, quotes, newlines, brackets before joining.

title: Unnormalized multiline free-form fields in markdown persistence
description: user_messages_summary and session_context are written directly into markdown rule bodies with no line normalization or heading sanitization. Multiline user_messages_summary malforms the ## Evidence list; a field containing markdown headers (## Heading) corrupts structural section parsing in knowledge-meta-builder.ts.
fix_direction: Sanitize/escape leading '#' in free-form user text to prevent heading collision, and indent continuation lines of multiline summary values when embedding inside list bullets.
